objective: Stratégie sur API3USDC 5m. Objectif de stratégie: Sur le marché {token} en 5m, utiliser l'indicateur Bollinger + Momentum pour détecter des breakouts sur une base hebdomadaire, avec un SL à 3% sous la demande et TP a 4%. Comporter ce positionnement par filtre horaire de liquidite en temps réel (délai = {delay}). Afficher le nombre total d'entrants ({num_entries}) pendant les heures suivant le break, avec un SL de 2% et TP à l'issue du premier jour. Testez cette stratégie sur la famille robuste de contrôle (mean-reversion) en 5m, puis comparer aux autres familles de contrôles pour vérifier les avantages spécifiques de ce mode d'entrées.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is well defined and covers various aspects of trading such as use of Bollinger Bands, Momentum indicator and ATF. It also includes risk management with SL and TP at specific levels. The fallback contract could be useful in case the LLM condition isn't met. However, it would be beneficial to consider additional factors such as Volume or Market Depth when deciding upon the entry long criteria. Also considering other indicators like MACD might add more robustness to the strategy.
[Backup plan] 1. If results are poor (negative return), we could try to adjust our risk management parameters by changing SL and TP levels or even removing them altogether. 2. If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), we can consider adjusting our momentum criteria, for example, using a higher threshold for the Momentum indicator before entering long positions. Additionally, we might want to explore different timeframes for our indicators to see if that improves performance. 3. If the current strategy fails, one alternative approach could be looking at other indicators such as Volume or Market Depth when deciding upon the entry criteria and risk management parameters.
